title: Attestplane Proof Bundle (v1)
description: Top-level export artifact bundling a chain segment with verification metadata, framework mappings, and an explicit redaction policy. Locked by ADR-0008 (event taxonomy) and the claim-safety triad in docs/policy/. Verifiers consume this shape via `attestplane verify <bundle.json>` (M5). The schema is additive: optional fields may be added in minor releases; existing required-field semantics are frozen.

bundle_version.description: Frozen at 1 for the v1 bundle. Bump requires an ADR + deprecation window per ADR-0008 versioning rules.

chain_id.description: Stable opaque identifier for the chain (e.g., UUIDv7, or a runtime-assigned name).

schema_version.description: Substrate canonicalization schema version per ADR-0002.

genesis_hash_hex.description: Lowercase hex of the substrate's all-zero genesis hash.

head_hash_hex.description: Lowercase hex of the chain head's event_hash at bundle creation time.

head_seq.description: Seq of the last event in this bundle. -1 indicates an empty chain (genesis only).

producer_runtime.description: Free-form identifier of the runtime that produced these events, e.g., 'AIOS v3.4.1' or 'Claude Code v2.1.129'.

anchor_ref.description: Optional reference to an AnchorRecord (M5, ADR-0003). Free-form when ADR-0003 ships; reserved field today.

evidence_taxonomy_version.description: v1 taxonomy version per ADR-0008. Independent of schema_version.

events.description: Chain segment in seq order. Each item is a ChainedEvent serialised in the JSONL row shape (see sdk/python/src/attestplane/storage/jsonl.py). Verifiers reconstruct ChainedEvent objects and call verify_chain.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC with 6-digit microsecond precision and literal Z. See docs/spec/canonical-json-v1.md § Datetimes.

event_type.description: v1 taxonomy member or future-taxonomy event_type. Verifiers tolerate unknown strings per ADR-0008 § Substrate stays neutral.

verifier_version.description: Semver of the verifier that produced this report, e.g., '0.1.0'.

verification_method.description: v1 supports two values; 'canonical-bytes-walk+anchor' is reserved for the M5 RFC-3161 anchor verifier.

anchor_status.description: Optional anchor verdict from the live RFC-3161 path. 'quarantined' means TSA/network failure was fail-closed instead of being reported as a valid anchor.

framework_mappings.description: Optional list of obligation_ids satisfied (or designed-toward) by this bundle. Each id MUST resolve to an entry in one of the registries shipped under attestplane/obligations/.

evidence_event_indexes.description: Indexes into the bundle's events array whose presence supports the mapped obligation.

implementation_status_at_bundle_time.description: Snapshot of the obligation's implementation_status at bundle-creation time. Echoed into the bundle so a verifier can detect if the registry has shifted since.

forbidden_fields.description: Echo of the redaction policy applied by the bundle producer. The list MUST include the canonical forbidden-fields set (customer names, person names, PII, raw documents, contracts, scripts, tickets, emails, secrets, tokens, JWTs, private keys, raw audit payloads). The bundle is a self-describing redaction contract: a verifier can refuse to consume a bundle whose forbidden_fields list does not include a required term.

signature.description: Optional Sigstore signature over the canonical-JSON encoding of (bundle_version, chain_metadata, events, verification_report, framework_mappings, forbidden_fields). Ships at M6; reserved field in v1.

policy_trace_refs.description: Optional flat list of event_hash_hex values for every ChainedEvent in this bundle whose event_type == 'policy_check_event'. Ordered by chain seq ascending; deduplicated (an event_hash uniquely identifies its event). Builder auto-populates per ADR-0012 § 2; callers do not manage this list. Absent (not empty) when the chain contains no policy_check_event rows — preserves byte identity with v0.0.1-alpha bundles.

retention_proofs.description: Optional ADR-0015 commit-then-redact retention/deletion proof markers. Verifiers check marker shape and event-hash references only; this field does not claim GDPR compliance or legal sufficiency.

signatures.description: Optional per-event or per-segment-head Ed25519 signatures produced by an ADR-0005 Signer. Strictly additive in v1 — bundles produced before ADR-0005 ship omit this field entirely. Verifier semantics (signature_status, plurality, coverage transitivity) locked in docs/architecture/adr_0005_t3_t4_review_20260517.md § 1 D10–D12.

signature_schema_version.description: Frozen at 1 for v1. Bumping requires a new ADR + deprecation window per ADR-0005 plan § 7.

key_id.description: 16-byte hex fingerprint (first 16 bytes of SHA-256 over public_key_der).

signing_cert_chain_b64.description: Empty in v1 (bring-your-own-key path). ADR-0007 fills with Fulcio short-lived certs without bumping schema.

signed_payload_b64.description: The canonical-JSON bytes that Ed25519 signed. Verifier reconstructs and compares for defense in depth.
